name: python3-pyexcel
title: python3-pyexcel
summary: Single API for reading, manipulating and writing data (Python 3)
description:
Single API for reading, manipulating and writing data (Python 3)
This package contains a Python Wrapper that provides single API for reading,
manipulating and writing data in csv, ods, xls, xlsx and xlsm files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
